name: fjall
description: LSM-tree based key-value storage engine with thread-safe BTreeMap-like API

description.value: LSM-tree based key-value storage engine with thread-safe BTreeMap-like API, similar to RocksDB but pure Rust
description.comment: Designed as a pure Rust alternative to RocksDB with modern API

implementation.comment: 100% safe and stable Rust with no unsafe code

schema-model.comment: Type-safe API through Rust generics with Keyspace and PartitionHandle

transactions.comment: Optional serializable transactions with OptimisticTransactionDatabase or SingleWriterTransactionDatabase

range-queries.comment: Range and prefix searching with bidirectional iteration

secondary-indexes.comment: Key-value store only, no built-in secondary index support

storage-architecture.comment: Similar to RocksDB architecture with MVCC for snapshot isolation

compression.comment: Built-in LZ4 compression enabled by default

memory-mapped-io.comment: Does not use mmap; uses standard file I/O

max-db-size.comment: No documented size limits; LSM-tree design scales well

hot-backup.comment: No built-in hot backup yet; issue #52 tracks checkpointing feature request. Currently requires shutdown for safe backup.

incremental-backup.comment: No incremental backup support; backup feature itself is still planned

point-in-time-recovery.comment: WAL recovery is automatic on crash but no arbitrary point-in-time restore capability

online-compaction.comment: Automatic background compaction with size-tiered, leveled, and FIFO strategies; concurrent compaction since v2.5

repair-tools.comment: No dedicated repair tools; recommendation is to let app crash and restart for recovery from transient errors

export-format.comment: No built-in export format; bulk loading API can help restore from external backups

pure-rust.comment: 100% safe and stable Rust with no C dependencies

async-support.comment: Thread-safe API compatible with tokio; example provided in docs

api-safety.comment: 100% safe Rust with no unsafe code

idiomatic-api.comment: Modern BTreeMap-like API with Result types and iterators

serde-integration.comment: No built-in serde support; users implement serialization

wasm-compatible.comment: Relies on filesystem I/O, not WASM compatible

acid-compliant.comment: Full ACID when using transaction mode

concurrent-readers.comment: Thread-safe with MVCC for snapshot isolation

multi-process.comment: Single-process only; cannot be accessed from multiple processes

maturity.comment: Active development since late 2023, not yet 1.0

ios.comment: Not explicitly documented; pure Rust suggests possible but unverified

android.comment: Not explicitly documented; pure Rust suggests possible but unverified

use-cases.comment: Good for write-heavy workloads with LSM-tree architecture

maintenance-status.comment: Very active development with frequent releases

documentation-quality.comment: Adequate API docs with examples, but limited guides
